diagnosis.explanation: SDS components (CUSUM of p_rad divergence, acceleration integral) are HIGHER in clean shots than disrupted. This is because MAST clean shots are high-performance with active heating (p_rad 4.1MW) while disrupted shots have lower p_rad (550kW). Any threshold that catches disrupted shots triggers on all clean shots (FA=98%).

conclusion: SDS adds no value over recovery filter on MAST. The physical signals it uses (p_rad dynamics, acceleration) are counter-indicative — higher in clean shots. Only P_GRU component discriminates, which is exactly the recovery filter.
